title: Content Creator & Marketing Assistant
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Welcome to ICHIGO.SG (一起购), your one-stop-shop for all your needs. Our mission is to provide our customers with a wide range of high-quality products at competitive prices, coupled with exceptional customer service and reliable shipping.

  • We operate primarily through Facebook Live Streaming (facebook.com/sg.ichigo), integrated with our ecommerce website, which will be designed to provide a seamless user experience for customers. We understand the importance of convenience, and that's why we have created a user-friendly website that makes shopping online a breeze, during our Live Stream and at our ecommerce store.

At ICHIGO.SG, we take pride in offering a wide range of products that are carefully curated to meet the needs of our customers. Whether you're looking for authentic food, latest fashion, high quality skin & body care, health & wellness, niche collectibles, reliable home appliances, or trendy household products, we have you covered.

Thank you for choosing ICHIGO.SG as your trusted online retailer. We look forward to serving you for years to come, let’s 一起购!

Job Summary

Create and deliver engaging digital content to drive brand awareness and sales through live streams, social media, and e-commerce platforms, collaborating closely with marketing and sales teams to achieve company objectives.

Responsibilities

  • Develop original digital content including videos, short clips, photos, and scripts tailored for live streams, social media channels, and e-commerce platforms to enhance customer engagement and brand visibility
  • Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to align content creation with the company’s branding, vision, and campaign goals, ensuring consistent messaging and impact
  • Participate actively in content ideation, planning, and execution processes to generate innovative and effective marketing materials that support business growth
  • Communicate fluently in both English and Mandarin to produce bilingual content and facilitate cross-functional collaboration
  • Work independently and as part of a team to manage assigned projects, demonstrating creativity and a hands-on approach to meet deadlines and quality standards

Required competencies and certifications

  • Proficiency in spoken and written English and Mandarin to support bilingual content creation and communication

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Ability to work collaboratively within a team while maintaining autonomy on assigned tasks
  • Creative mindset with practical skills to execute content production effectively
